examples: Even this "delayed" seroconversion among this small population is highly debated among medical professionals.
Patients cycled between the following health states: viral suppression, ongoing viremia, seroconversion, hepatocellular carcinoma, cirrhosis and death.
Current antiviral treatment can successfully control the HBV replication, and can induce HBeAg seroconversion in some patients with chronic HBV infection.
